title: ownership-dns-txt
description: Verifier input for domain ownership via DNS TXT at _neus.<domain>. Only `domain` is required in this object: `walletAddress` may be omitted when the proof request supplies a verified signer wallet, which the service fills in before the verifier runs. The TXT record must still use `wallet=` with the same wallet or account address NEUS uses for this check.

domain.description: Hostname to verify (DNS control is proven via TXT at _neus.<domain>).

walletAddress.description: Optional inside `data` when the proof request already includes a verified signer walletAddress (filled in by the service when omitted). If you set this field, it must follow signer and delegation rules. The DNS TXT value must be `wallet=` followed by the same wallet or account address NEUS uses when it runs this check.
